trans-unit.source: This combination already exists as a reverse combination.
trans-unit.note: Table ServiceItemMatrixS365 - NamedType CombExistErr

trans-unit.source: An item cannot be incompatible with itself.
trans-unit.note: Table ServiceItemMatrixS365 - NamedType ItemIncErr
Table ServiceItemMatrixS365 - Field Service Item 1 S365 - Property Caption
Table ServiceItemMatrixS365 - Field Service Item 2 S365 - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Posting an invoice for a purchase order is not allowed. Please review the document and try again.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit 4HC Event Subscribers - NamedType PostingOnlyReceiveErr
%1=Service Item 1,%2=Service Item 2
Codeunit EventSubscriber S365 - Method ValidateIncompatibleItems - NamedType ItemMatrixErr
%1=Sales Quote No. %2=increment
Codeunit S365Functions - Method SalesQuoteAmendArchive - NamedType DocNoLbl

trans-unit.source: Do you need to confirm this qoute?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit SQmodFunction S365 - Method ConfirmQoute - NamedType QouteConfirmMsg
Codeunit SQmodFunction S365 - Method CreateJobFromTemplate - NamedType JobCreateMsg

trans-unit.source: Project %1 has been created for Sales Order %2
trans-unit.note: %1=Project No, %2=Order No
Codeunit SQmodFunction S365 - Method SendNotificationEmail - NamedType EmailSubTxt

trans-unit.source: Document %1 has been archived & Copied document lines and header information from %1 sales document to this document.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Document No.
Codeunit SQmodFunction S365 - Method ShowMessageAfterSQuoteAmendArchive - NamedType Text001Msg

trans-unit.source: Document %1 has been archived & deleted. Document lines and header information copied from %1 sales document to this document.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Document No.
Codeunit SQmodFunction S365 - Method ShowMessageAfterSQuoteAmendArchive - NamedType Text002Msg
Page Charge Item Mapping S365 - Property Caption
Page Charge Item Mapping S365 - Control Charge Item No. - Property ToolTip
Page Charge Item Mapping S365 - Control Item No. - Property ToolTip
Page Item Combination S365 - Property Caption
Page Item Combination S365 - Control Service Item 1 S365 - Property ToolTip
Page Item Combination S365 - Control Service Item 2 S365 - Property ToolTip
Page PackageTypeListS365 - Property Caption
Page PackageTypeListS365 - Control Code - Property ToolTip
Page PackageTypeListS365 - Control Description - Property ToolTip
Page Pending Approval Entries - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total amount (excl. VAT) on the document awaiting approval. The amount is stated in the local currency.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Amount (LCY) - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the ID of the user who must approve the document.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Approver ID - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date and the time that the document was sent for approval.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Date-Time Sent for Approval - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the record that the approval is related to.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Details - Property ToolTip
Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Details - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the document number copied from the relevant sales or purchase document, such as a purchase order or a sales quote.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Document No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the type of document that an approval entry has been created for. Approval entries can be created for six different types of sales or purchase documents:
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Document Type - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies that the approval is overdue.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Overdue - Property ToolTip
Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Overdue - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the record that you are requested to approve.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Control RecordIDText - Property ToolTip
Page Pending Approval Entries - Control RecordIDText - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the ID of the user who sent the approval request for the document to be approved.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Sender ID - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the order of approvers when an approval workflow involves more than one approver.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Sequence No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the approval status for the entry:
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Status - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the ID of the table where the record that is subject to approval is stored.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Control Table ID - Property ToolTip
Page Pending Approval Entries - Action &Show - Property Caption
Page Pending Approval Entries - Action All Entries - Property ToolTip
Page Pending Approval Entries - Action All Entries - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View or add comments for the record.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Action Comments - Property ToolTip
Page Pending Approval Entries - Action Comments - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View approval requests that are overdue.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Action O&verdue Entries - Property ToolTip
Page Pending Approval Entries - Action O&verdue Entries - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Open the document, journal line, or card that the approval request is for.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Action Record - Property ToolTip
Page Pending Approval Entries - Action Record - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Delegate the approval request to another approver that has been set up as your substitute approver.
trans-unit.note: Page Pending Approval Entries - Action &Delegate - Property ToolTip
Page Pending Approval Entries - Action &Delegate - Property Caption
Generated from the PromotedActionCategories property index 1.
Page Pending Approval Entries - Action Category_Process - Property Caption
Page Pending Approval Entries - Action Category_Show - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Enter the unique identifier for the record or port.

trans-unit.source: Provide a detailed description or name for the record or port.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Code field.

Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.
trans-unit.note: Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control Bill-to Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.
trans-unit.note: Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control No. - Property ToolTip
Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies if the amount is for prices, costs, or profit values.
trans-unit.note: Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control AmountType - Property ToolTip
Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control AmountType - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the resource that the allocations apply to.
trans-unit.note: Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control ResourceFilter - Property ToolTip
Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control ResourceFilter - Property Caption
Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control Matrix Options - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the range of values that are displayed in the matrix window, for example, the total period. To change the contents of the field, choose Next Set or Previous Set.
trans-unit.note: Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control ColumnsSet - Property ToolTip
Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control ColumnsSet - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the dates that will be used to filter the amounts in the window.
trans-unit.note: Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control DateFilter - Property ToolTip
Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control DateFilter - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies by which period amounts are displayed.
trans-unit.note: Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control PeriodType - Property ToolTip
Page Resource Alloc MatrixS365 - Control PeriodType - Property Caption
